channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lakers blow past Jazz in Doncic debut, 132-113
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz were no match for the Lakers in the much-anticipated debut of Luka Doncic. Doncic had 14 points, five rebounds and four assists in his Lakers debut as Los Angeles beat the Utah Jazz 132-113 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Luka Doncic makes his Lakers debut and quickly connects with LeBron James in a 132-113 win over Utah
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 14 points in limited playing time during his debut with the Lakers on Monday night, joining their starting lineup alongside LeBron James and immediately getting into the flow during Los Angeles' 132-113 victory over the Utah Jazz.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LaMelo Ball misses second half of Hornets' game against Brooklyn with right ankle soreness
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — LaMelo Ball missed the second half of Charlotte's 97-89 loss to the Brooklyn Nets on Monday night because of right ankle soreness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fox projects the Super Bowl averaged a record 126 million U.S. viewers
item.description: Fox Sports is projecting a Super Bowl record average audience of 126 million U.S. viewers across television and streaming platforms for Philadelphia's 40-22 victory over Kansas City on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Timberwolves sale to Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez back on track after arbitration ruling
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The ownership transfer of the Minnesota Timberwolves must continue as originally planned, after a three-person arbitration panel ruled 2-1 that controlling owner Glen Taylor must cede control of the NBA club to partners Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez in the disputed final phase of t
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NBA adds Atlanta's Trae Young, Dallas' Kyrie Irving to All-Star Game as injury replacements
item.description: Atlanta guard Trae Young is headed to the NBA All-Star Game after all, and Dallas guard Kyrie Irving has been picked once again as well.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Like Father, Like Son; the Neals are a Wrestling family
item.description: The apple doesn't fall far from the tree, and for the Neal family, the apple has landed on the wrestling mats at Poway High School.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Record betting at BetMGM and Caesars for Sunday's Super Bowl
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Eagles weren't the only big winners Sunday. Sportsbooks also came out on top in the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senator opens inquiry into US Center for SafeSport’s hiring of investigator charged with sex crimes
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee is looking into how a former police officer landed an investigator's job at the U.S.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sabathia to have Yankees logo on Hall of Fame plaque, Wagner the Astros, Suzuki the Mariners
item.description: CC Sabathia will have a New York Yankees logo on the cap of his Hall of Fame plaque and Billy Wagner will have the symbol of the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mavericks' Anthony Davis suffers injury in debut following blockbuster trade
item.description: Dallas Mavericks forward Anthony Davis suffered an injury in his debut with the team and could be out longer after the team acquired him in a massive trade.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 6 hidden messages in Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl performance
item.description: Kendrick Lamar’s Super Bowl halftime performance is growing in viewership hours after the big game, gaining more than 11 million views since it aired Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Swiss skier Franjo von Allmen wins downhill gold at world championships
item.description: Franjo von Allmen won gold in the downhill at the Alpine skiing world championships on Sunday as the Swiss team swept the men's speed events.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Martinez scores 30 as USU beats Fresno State, 89-81
item.description: FRESNO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Ian Martinez scored 30 points and led Utah State to an 89-81 victory over Fresno State Friday night. Martinez, who made 10 of 14 shots from the field, tied a career high with eight rebounds for the Aggies (21-3, 11-2 Mountain West Conference).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Super Bowl prices are down this year. StubHub explains why
item.description: If you’re still planning to attend the Super Bowl on Sunday, you can expect a price drop compared to last year.
item.dc:creator: JOHN CARUCCI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Raiders legend Fred Biletnikoff keeps daughter's dream alive
item.description: LOOMIS, Calif. - Fred Biletnikoff still goes to a lot of Raiders games. "Sometimes I don't know why," laughed the Hall of Fame wideout. "It's just the history." Fred has a lot of history with the Raiders.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Dylan Guenther scores game-winner in OT again
item.description: COLUMBUS (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther has proven to have a penchant for the dramatic. For the second straight game, Utah's leading scorer found the back of the net in the final minute of overtime to give UHC a 3-2 win over Columbus Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Daytona boss inspires students with his NASCAR journey
item.description: The "Super Bowl" of racing, the Daytona 500, will be the next biggest event in the world of sports, taking place February 16, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Davis Suppes, NewsNation

item.title: Increased security in New Orleans ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: More than 125,000 visitors — including President Donald Trump — are expected to converge on the Big Easy this week.
item.dc:creator: Xavier Walton, NewsNation

item.title: Virginia Halas McCaskey, longtime Bears owner and matriarch, dies at 102, team announces
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — Virginia Halas McCaskey, the longtime owner and matriarch of the Chicago Bears, died Thursday at 102, the team announced in a news release. Virginia served as the owner of the Bears since her father and team founder George S. Halas died on Oct. 31, 1983.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Three UPenn teammates of Lia Thomas sue university
item.description: Three former teammates of transgender swimmer Lia Thomas sued the University of Pennsylvania over rights violations
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Madsen brothers lead Utes past Colorado, 72-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Lawson Lovering scored 12 points and Utah kept Colorado winless in the Big 12 beating the Buffaloes 72-59 on Wednesday night. Ezra Ausar and reserve Mason Madsen each scored 10 points for the Utes (13-9, 5-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz come back to beat Warriors, 131-128
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Jordan Clarkson scored 31 points and Keyonte George added 26 to lead the Utah Jazz to a 131-128 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Wednesday night. Isaiah Collier added 20 points and 11 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Tri City Christian 49, Army Navy 37
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great game on Monday night in Vista with Tri City Christian hosting Army Navy. All tied up at 21 at halftime, the Eagles pulled off and won 49-37. Lead by Caleb Williams who hit for 14. Army Navy was lead by Yanler Ramos, he also poured in 14.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
